code: import axios from'axios';const BASE_URLS=['http://localhost:8080/api/librarians','http://localhost:8080/librarians'];async function requestWithFallback(buildRequest){let lastError;for(const baseUrl of BASE_URLS){try{const response=await buildRequest(baseUrl);return response.data;}catch(err){lastError=err;}}throw lastError;}export const librarianService={getAll:()=>requestWithFallback(baseUrl=>axios.get(baseUrl)),getById:id=>requestWithFallback(baseUrl=>axios.get("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id))),create:librarian=>requestWithFallback(baseUrl=>axios.post(baseUrl,librarian)),update:(id,librarian)=>requestWithFallback(baseUrl=>axios.put("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id),librarian)),delete:id=>requestWithFallback(baseUrl=>axios.delete("".concat(baseUrl,"/").concat(id))),searchByEmail:email=>requestWithFallback(baseUrl=>axios.get("".concat(baseUrl,"/search/email?email=").concat(encodeURIComponent(email)))),login:async(email,password)=>{const attempts=[baseUrl=>axios.post("".concat(baseUrl,"/login"),{email,password}),baseUrl=>axios.post("".concat(baseUrl,"/login"),{emailId:email,password}),baseUrl=>axios.post("".concat(baseUrl,"/login"),{email,passcode:password}),baseUrl=>axios.post("".concat(baseUrl,"/login"),{username:email,password}),baseUrl=>axios.post("".concat(baseUrl,"/login"),{userName:email,password}),baseUrl=>axios.post('http://localhost:8080/api/librarians/login',{email,password}),baseUrl=>axios.post('http://localhost:8080/api/librarians/login',{emailId:email,password}),baseUrl=>axios.post('http://localhost:8080/librarians/login',{email,password}),baseUrl=>axios.post('http://localhost:8080/librarians/login',{emailId:email,password})];let lastError;for(const attempt of attempts){try{const response=await requestWithFallback(baseUrl=>attempt(baseUrl));return response;}catch(err){lastError=err;}}throw lastError;}};
